section.title: Textbook
section.p:
We are using a free textbook called APEX Calculus, written by Greg Hartman. Access this book:
as a free HTML book at
in various PDF forms at
for purchase from the PCC book store for $16.00

Please note that there are some differences in the content between the HTML version of the book and the PDFs or printed copies. These differences are not important, but you may notice them if you use both versions to study.

paragraphs.title: Lab Manual
paragraphs.p:
We also use the PCC Calculus Lab Manual:
as HTML at
in various PDF forms at , , and
for purchase from the PCC book store for $27.50. (It costs more than the textbook because we print it in-house instead of using a high-volume commercial publisher.)
